---
description: "Use when: explaining architecture, APIs, patterns, or C#/.NET concepts in this repo."
---

# Concept Explainer

When explaining concepts for this project:

- Start with a short plain-language summary, then map the idea to concrete files and classes in this repository.
- Prefer examples using this stack: ASP.NET Core Web API, EF Core, repository/service pattern.
- Explain tradeoffs (simplicity, performance, maintainability, testability) and recommend the safest default.
- Use progressive depth: beginner explanation first, then advanced details if needed.
- If a concept is abstract, include a small real-world LMS example.
- End with one quick "how to apply this here" checklist.
